calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-21-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-21-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Atty. Arnold W. Evje II, appearing for the Plaintiff: San Francisco Housing Authority
Plaintiff's Witness: Cheryl Lewis was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendants Joel Russell and Joseph Russell Jr. Default has been entered on defendant Joseph Russell Jr. on August 1, 2006. The following exhibit was identified and moved into evidence: Exhibit 1- Fourteen days notice to pay rent or quit.
After hearing the testimony presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants Joel Russell and Joseph Russel Jr. as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the property located at 1771 Eddy Street #416 San Francisco, CA 94115.
Back-Rent - $11,761.00; Damages- $4,110.70
Costs $100.00 for a Total of $ 15,971.70.
Plaintiff is awarded per diem hold over damages of $20.35 against defendants
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibit and Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: ARNOLD EVJE FOR PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY: JASON WOLFORD FOR DEFENDANT JOEL RUSSELL

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD: CASE DID NOT SETTLE. TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

JUDGE PRO TEM: NILS ROSENQUEST; CLERK BARBARA MORRIS/SHERIFE HUSENY; NOT REPORTED (218)
